title.en: Ye Tian glanced around and muttered.

content.en:
Rumble!!!

One by one of the twelve cosmic epochs descended, and they were more or less with one or two galactic levels by their side.

This time, the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Child Program is specially held for the Galaxy level, and if you exceed the Galaxy level, you are not eligible to participate in the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Child Program this time.

Of course, if your cultivation is lower than the Galaxy level, you can also participate.

But in this way, it will be too much of a loss if the cultivation is low, and the combat effectiveness will be too weak accordingly.

"Fifty-eight galaxy level!"

Ye Tian glanced around and muttered.

Obviously, the galaxy level that appeared here was only a part of it, and it was impossible for there to be only such a small galaxy level among the forces of the twelve cosmic eras.

Ye Tian didn't despise these galaxy levels, the last time he fought with him was only one of them, the son of the era, and among these people, there must be a son of the era who is much more powerful than the son of the world!

His accumulation at the galaxy level was not very sufficient, so he was not arrogant to the level of being invincible at the galaxy level.

Besides, there are a lot of Era Children here, and there are definitely a lot of hole cards, even if he can defeat other Era Children one-on-one, but once these Era Children are united, he may not be an opponent.

"Enter the Ten Thousand Worlds, try to keep a low profile!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, the Lord of the Yuan Gu stood up and said, "First God Lord, First Demon Lord, we are also here to participate in the Ten Thousand Worlds God Son Project, what do you think?"

The First Divine Lord hurriedly spoke: "Lord of the Yuan Gu, this time it is just for the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project held by the galaxy-level genius of our cosmic era, and strive to cultivate a genius with bad luck against the sky, so as to give birth to another era child for this universe, you are not the creatures of this cosmic era, and the luck on your body is almost nothing, so it is a little unruly for you to participate!"

The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty smiled slightly, he knew that the First Divine Lord and the others also wanted them to participate, but he deliberately said so.

But there is no way, they really want to let these galaxy-level juniors enter the Ten Thousand Realms God Son Project, and only the forces of this universe have the ability to hold such a plan, no matter how strong they are, they can't start it.

Because this Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Plan needs to mobilize luck, and it also needs to mobilize the power of the origin of the universe, which can only be done by the forces of the current universe era.

"First Divine Master, if you have any conditions to mention, as long as you allow these juniors to join the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project!" said the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

The First Divine Lord was deliberately silent for a while, and then pretended to consult with the other Supremes for a while.

Soon, the First Divine Lord said, "Lord of the Yuan Gu, it's okay to let these juniors of yours enter the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Plan." First of all, only ten people are allowed in, not too many. After all, you juniors are too strong, far surpassing our juniors, if you go in too much, won't our juniors be killed by you? The second condition, I want to know how you have survived to this cosmic era?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu's face changed slightly, and said, "First Divine Lord, we can agree to the first condition, but we can't tell us the second condition!"

The First Divine Lord also knew that it was impossible for the Lord of the Yuan Gu to say, and he just deliberately made things difficult for the Lord of the Yuan Gu when he asked like this.

"Okay, change the condition!" The first god said: "Two supreme treasures, I know that you are not short of supreme treasures, this condition is not difficult for you!"

"What, the Supreme Treasure?" the Ancient Lord's face changed, "First Divine Lord, your appetite is too great, this is just a small test for the juniors, you actually asked for the Supreme Treasure, and it is still two! I can't agree to this condition!"

The First Divine Lord and the Lord of the Yuan Gu discussed for a long time, and finally reached a condition that was satisfactory to both parties.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu only needs to pay a supreme treasure, and he is not allowed to interfere in the plan of the God Son of the Ten Thousand Worlds, no matter what happens in the Ten Thousand Worlds, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supreme beings are not allowed to interfere.

This agreement signed the cosmic origin contract, and once violated, the punishment was extremely severe.

This agreement is actually very fair to both parties, after all, once something happens to the galaxy-level geniuses of all races, the First Divine Lord and other supremes will not be able to rescue them.

So, it's a big gamble!

It is conceivable that the galaxy-level geniuses of the Ten Thousand Races are destined to suffer heavy casualties, but in order for the plan to succeed, even if there is only a glimmer of hope, they will do it.

"Let's get started!"

The First Divine Lord spoke.

Bang!!!!!

The vast Ten Thousand Worlds are presented in front of people, and on the periphery of the Ten Thousand Worlds are dense imprints of the law, protecting the Ten Thousand Worlds layer by layer.

"It's okay!"

The Lord of the Ancient looked at the newly established Ten Thousand Realms and nodded.

But for him, it's just okay.

He may not be able to easily break this Ten Thousand Realms alone, but as long as several top supremes join forces, it will not be difficult to break this Ten Thousand Worlds.

Click!

There is a crack in the Ten Thousand Worlds, and that is the entrance.

At this time, the First God Lord said, "This Ten Thousand Worlds has ten thousand worlds, ten great thousand worlds, and one heavenly world. You will teleport into the 10,000 Middle Thousand Worlds in batches, and then you will need to fight each other in the Middle Thousand Worlds, accumulate enough luck to enter the Great Thousand Worlds, and then tear apart in the Great Thousand Worlds, accumulate enough Qi Luck and then enter the Heavenly Realm. In the end, the winner in the Heavenly Realm can forge the strongest luck and get a cosmic position - the Emissary of the Ten Thousand Domains!"

"Now, I announce the opening of the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project!"

As soon as the First Divine Lord finished speaking, he took out a scroll.

This scroll spread out, covering the entire Ten Thousand Realms, and the power of the extremely rich rules poured out and poured into the Ten Thousand Realms.

At the same time, the power of the Origin of the Universe has locked this area, which means that this time the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project has successfully received the attention of the Origin of the Universe.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu noticed the power of the Origin of the Universe and frowned slightly, obviously very jealous.

Now, although he has become a member of this universe, he has done so through special methods, even if he has concealed the origin of the universe, he is still suppressed by the origin of the universe, and he will naturally be afraid of the origin of the universe.

After all, the mere Supreme is still just an ant to the origin of the universe.

"Let's go inside!"

The First Divine Lord shouted.

Rumble!!!!

One by one, the galaxy level of the ten thousand races poured into the ten thousand realms.

Most of the galaxy level here didn't know what the purpose of the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project was this time, and they really thought it was an opportunity.

But in fact, they became cannon fodder, just to carry out this plan.

Ye Tian had been staring at the sons of the ten epochs who were about to enter the Ten Thousand Realms, and after they entered, they also flew into the Ten Thousand Realms.

The Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project has officially begun!
